message:
The other day, I was rushing around the house, trying to get everything ready for a little family gathering. In the midst of it all, my dog, Max, decided it was the perfect time to play tug-of-war with my shoelaces. I was frustrated at first, but then I realized he was just trying to lighten the mood. After a few moments of laughter, I took a break to play with him, and it reminded me how important it is to stay calm and enjoy the little wins, even in the chaos. 

Later, I was so glad I had prepared a little emergency kit for Max, just in case something unexpected happened. Having that little bit of peace of mind made the day so much more enjoyable. 

Anyone else have a furry friend that knows just how to brighten a hectic day? 🐾
